key_findings.dominant_mechanism: Parentification of visit-compliance decisions — 'It was her choice not to go' (ROW-14841). Court-ordered visit compliance placed on Olivia's decision-making across the Phase C visit-refusal cascade.
key_findings.highest_consequence_signal: S003 (B-029): Police report disclosure to Olivia — Melissa told 10-year-old that her father filed a police report about her visit refusal. Documented behavioral impact: Olivia stopped talking to Eli for over a week.
key_findings.bilateral_signal: S005 (B-030): Feb 2026 domestic argument — children ages 10, 6, 1 hiding during adult argument; Eli confirmed children asked about verbal abuse and he explained it. Eli-direction Sev-2 (mitigated but confirmed); Melissa-direction amplification deployment compound.
key_findings.stabilizer_pattern: CP2 Q3 confirmed: 'Olivia is Melissa's stabilizer' — emotional parentification as behavioral backdrop. Counselor relay S001 (B-027) is the most direct text-record evidence.
key_findings.therapist_pattern: Melissa drops therapists when called out (Q6). Clinically significant context for GAL analysis of Olivia's therapeutic history — may indicate strategic therapeutic engagement.
key_findings.structural_note: All 5 signals are Phase B/C. Zero Phase A signals — pattern activates with the visit-refusal cascade. RF-11 is structurally embedded in RF-02 (gatekeeping): parentification is the child-facing dimension of the gatekeeping mechanism.

session_log.notes: RF-11 pass initialized. B-001 calibration batch — zero primary flags, cooperative baseline confirmed. CP2 generated. 6 calibration questions covering Feb 2026 incident (bilateral), police report, parentification, emotional stabilizer, therapist coaching, GAL coaching.

arcs_updated: ARC-RF11-001 initialized CANDIDATE (B-027 S001); CANDIDATE→WATCHING (B-028 S002); WATCHING→ACTIVE (B-029 S003+S004); 5 signals total
session_log.notes: CP2 answers confirmed all 6 addenda. Key confirmations: Q1 (children hiding, Eli confirmed verbal abuse lookup with children present — Sev-2 bilateral); Q3 (Olivia as stabilizer confirmed); Q4 (police report disclosure to Olivia confirmed, week-long behavioral impact); Q5 ('her choice' text-documented in B-029); Q6 (therapist coaching probable, therapy non-continuity pattern). 5 primary signals: all Sev-2, concentrated in Phase C (B-027-B-030). 1 bilateral signal (B-030). 5 compound patterns. ARC-RF11-001 unresolved at dataset close.
